title: [CI:DOCS] Add troubleshooting tip for open files
body:
Add a troubleshooting note addressing the
too many open files issues noted in this
BZ: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1829596

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
My concern here is this might be covering up a leak?
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@rhatdan just realized this has gone stale.  Any adjustments that could be made to the text for the troubleshooting?  Or should we close and forget?  I'd rather adjust or just merge after I rebase.
Let's talk about this on Monday.
Nope, lets do this today at standup. (Which I will be late for.)

Closing per discussions with @rhatdan and @vrothberg .  They're concerned this issue may be something that should be solved rather than band-aided.  Will look at the underlying issue separately once we get a reproducer, it may have been cured with changes to the CNI already as we've not received other reports.
